votes.reason: This elegantly preserves player agency while creating severe, cascading consequences across bloodlines and the Menagerie, perfectly embodying the consensus.
Implementing imperfect automation during Deep Tide runs based on Trust and Drift creates the intended rich tension without expanding the Caretaker's action vocabulary.
While I support corruption mutating the lexicon, my argued position was for it to unlock gameplay utility (Black Market shortcuts), not purely narrative comprehension.
This is a masterful, zero-cost integration that makes the Dream System feel dynamically haunted by player actions, as highlighted in the synthesis.
Having the 2x2 pixel survive the void is the perfect mechanical expression of care persisting through cycles, as I strongly endorsed.
Repurposing the Prophecy Machine to surveil the Caretaker after the Aleph reveal is a brilliant narrative reinforcement using existing systems.
